descriptionEn:
Faros Seaside Bar, located in Glarokavos, Pefkochori, is a relaxed seaside venue with a distinctive lighthouse-inspired identity and an authentic Halkidiki coastal atmosphere. Its warm design, maritime details and proximity to the beach create a pleasant setting for a break during a summer day by the sea.

The menu includes burgers, salads, snacks and souvlaki dishes. Guests can choose from options such as the Faros Gold, chicken or truffle burgers, club sandwiches, chicken nuggets, Greek salad, Caesar salad and pork or chicken souvlaki. Most dishes are well suited for a casual lunch or a satisfying snack after spending time on the beach.

With its friendly atmosphere and recognizable nautical concept, Faros Seaside Bar is a good choice for couples, families and groups of friends looking to combine seaside relaxation with simple and enjoyable food.
